_**User**_

in existing project , Wrap each main screen in a React Error Boundary with:

A "Something went wrong" message in on_surface @streamlist/src/theme/colors.ts 
A "Try Again" button that triggers refetch() on the screen's hook
The StreamList logo (that we have in app bar) @streamlist/App.tsx above the message


Skeleton Loading
All async sections must use skeleton states (not spinners):

Shapes match the content they will become
Shimmer animation cycling between surface_container_high and surface_bright (these you will get from @streamlist/src/theme/colors.ts )
Duration: ~1.5s loop

---
